sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43418" key="eu)a/cwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐάξων</orth>, <sense id="n43418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful axles</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐάντυξ</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
